title: Siege!
description: Medieval Weapons, adding variation and choice to combat in Minecraft!
body:
# Welcome!
Siege! is a datapack which introduces a few new weapon types into the game. These weapons have their own stats, textures, and recipes, and are designed to link seamlessly into the game.

There are 8 new medieval style weapons:
- Cudgels
- Lances
- Daggers
- Glaives
- Halberds
- Rapiers
- Claymores
- Battleaxes

Each comes in different material types. The recipes are added to your recipe book on joining the world.

### Installation Guide
1. Download the datapack and required resource pack
2. Drag and drop the datapack into your world before or after creation
3. If the world is already made, type "/reload"
